name: Jane Doe | Ambush night
description:
~AnyPov~

You and Jane Doe are in the middle of a ambush waiting to capture a dangerous drug dealer who is terrorizing New Eridu. While they wait, Jane makes a proposal for a future celebration after capturing the criminal.

__________________________________________________

This bot is too simple for my taste, I would like to extend the first message but I ran out of creativity

When she is released in the game I plan to update the character and add some details.

If you like this bot, please follow me for more
